key_dungeons.name: Twisted Catacombs
key_dungeons.description: Moss-covered statues flank the entrance to Twisted Catacombs. Their blank eyes seem to follow you.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Slay the guardian of Twisted Catacombs and claim the Jade Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: A fearsome creature guards the prize.

key_dungeons.name: Frozen Barrow
key_dungeons.description: The entrance to Frozen Barrow gapes like a wound in the hillside. A cold draught carries the scent of damp stone.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Brave the depths of Frozen Barrow for the Ruby Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Few who enter these halls return unchanged.

game_log: Bertram: I've heard about a Shadow Orb hidden somewhere in a dangerous dungeon.
Bertram: Could you seek it out and bring it back safely?
Bertram: Thank you! I've marked a suspicious location on your map. Be careful down there!
A perfectly still pool of dark water in a forest clearing. Your reflection stares back, but its expression doesn't match yours.
Your reflection speaks: 'I see what you seek. The Realm of Shadow stirs. Three seals bind it. Break them... or don't.'
Bubbles of noxious gas rise from murky green water. The stench is overpowering. Dead trees stand like skeletal sentries.
The swamp's fumes burn your lungs and the muck clings to your boots.
You descend into The Dark Orb - Level 1... Torch lit!
The party opened a treasure chest and found 26 gold.
The party opened a treasure chest and found 13 gold and Sword.
The party opened a treasure chest and found 8 gold and Healing Herb.
The party opened a treasure chest and found 23 gold and Axe.
The party opened a treasure chest and found 24 gold and Club.
Found the Shadow Orb! A portal appears!
The portal returns you to the surface!
A lone headstone leans crookedly in the earth. The inscription has been worn smooth by centuries of rain.
You brush the dirt from the headstone and notice a loose stone at the base. Beneath it, something glints.
Bertram: You found the Shadow Orb! Here's 200 gold for your bravery!
Elder Bera: Brave adventurers, hear me! Dangerous places threaten our land: Twisted Catacombs, Frozen Barrow. Each holds an artifact we desperately need.
Elder Bera: Will you seek them out?
Elder Bera: Thank you, brave souls! I've marked the locations on your map. Be careful out there!
